_readme: Authoritative element assignments for all cards in cards.jsonl. Used by US-GM-005 so Ralph does not have to guess. Elements: blood, holy, arcane, shadow, nature. Reasons are brief justifications for each choice.

strahd_i.reason: vampire lord; undead despite boss/ravenloft tags

strahd_ii.reason: vampire lord; undead despite boss/ravenloft tags

strahd_iii.reason: vampire lord; undead despite boss/ravenloft tags

parriwimple_i.reason: gentle giant, innocent/physical, no supernatural affiliation

sergei_spirit_i.reason: holy tag; restless spirit of a noble soul

argynvost_ii.reason: silver dragon ghost; radiant, noble, good-aligned

vivienne_kolyana_i.reason: normal noble; good-hearted Barovian, Kolyana family

blinsky_i.reason: toymaker; creates mechanical/magical constructs for Strahd

vasilka_i.reason: flesh golem; construct created via arcane/divine means

scarecrow_i.reason: Strahd's dark animated construct; shadow magic

decibelus_ii.reason: Strahd's seneschal and bodyguard; in service of darkness

baron_vargas_i.reason: oppressive Vallaki tyrant; rules through fear

lady_wachter_i.reason: Strahd cultist; communes with evil spirits

arrigal_i.reason: Vistani spy working for Strahd; assassin type

rahadin_ii.reason: Strahd's chamberlain; dusk elf assassin, psychic death shriek

ezmerelda_ii.reason: monster hunter; operates in darkness and guile, not divine power

van_richten_ii.reason: monster hunter; scholar/spy, not a holy warrior

king_in_yellow_i.reason: Dark Power sealed in the Amber Temple — an ancient arcane repository of forbidden knowledge

king_in_yellow_ii.reason: Dark Power sealed in the Amber Temple — an ancient arcane repository of forbidden knowledge

king_in_yellow_iii.reason: Dark Power sealed in the Amber Temple — an ancient arcane repository of forbidden knowledge
